---
title: "Niel Bauer Lab Notebook"
---

This is a repository for laboratory methods used throughout my PhD in the Avian Disease Ecology Laboratory at University of Rhode Island.

# Recent Experiments

## [RNA Extraction Training](RNA_extraction_practice.qmd)

# Standard protocols

[Tri-Reagen/Direct-zol RNA Isolation Protocol](https://github.com/JAHarvey/RNA-Blood-preservation-extraction/blob/main/RNA_Isolation_Protocol.mkd)

[DNA Extraction From Whole Blood Samples](Turkey_DNA_extraction.qmd)
